PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Private reception
PROFILE.NO_CALL: Do you want to send a message?
PROFILE.WHATSAPP_MESSAGE: Hi {{name}}, I saw your profile on FlammeRouge and would like more information.
PROFILE.COMMENT_ERROR_LOGIN: You must sign in to comment.
PROFILE.COMMENT_REPLY_ERROR_LOGIN: You must sign in to reply.
PROFILE.LIKE_ERROR_LOGIN: You must sign in to like.

COMMUNITY_RULES.TITLE: Community rules
COMMUNITY_RULES.SUBTITLE: To comment on Flamme Rouge, you must agree to follow our community guidelines.

RESPECT.TITLE: 1. Absolute respect
RESPECT.DESCRIPTION: Insults, discriminatory remarks, violent language, or hate speech are strictly prohibited.

REAL_OPINIONS.TITLE: 2. Real opinions
REAL_OPINIONS.DESCRIPTION: Comments must focus only on sharing real and useful experiences in a respectful way.

PRIVACY.TITLE: 3. Strict privacy
PRIVACY.DESCRIPTION: Posting the advertiser's personal information, such as address, private life, or real identity, is prohibited.

CONSEQUENCES.TITLE: 4. Consequences
CONSEQUENCES.DESCRIPTION: Breaking these rules will result in comment removal and suspension or permanent blocking of your account.

PROFILE_FORM.BLOCKED_COUNTRIES_HINT: Optional. Your ad will not be shown to visitors from the countries you select.
PROFILE_FORM.KYC_INFO_BODY: To complete this section we need to validate your identity. Review the image and follow the instructions.
PROFILE_FORM.CONTACT_PHONE_NUMERIC_ERROR: Contact phone only accepts numbers and the + sign
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_IMAGE_LIMIT_TITLE: Your plan does not cover all your photos
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_IMAGE_LIMIT_WARNING: You uploaded {{count}} photos, but your current plan allows up to {{limit}}. Choose {{plan}} to upload up to {{requiredLimit}} photos.
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_IMAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_MAX: You have {{count}} photos. The VIP plan maximum is {{max}}. Remove {{extra}} photo(s) to continue.
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_IMAGE_LIMIT_TOAST_TITLE: Plan too small for your photos
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_RENEW_TOAST_MESSAGE_DAYS: You have {{days}} days left on your active plan. Renew before it expires to keep your visibility.
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_RENEW_TOAST_MESSAGE_ONE: You have 1 day left on your active plan. Renew before it expires.
PROFILE_FORM.PLAN_RENEW_TOAST_MESSAGE_TODAY: Your plan expires today. Renew now to keep your visibility.
PROFILE_FORM.TOAST_PAYPAL_REQUIRED: Complete the PayPal payment to publish your profile
PROFILE_FORM.TOAST_WHATSAPP_PENDING: WhatsApp payment started. Your profile will stay in review until payment is confirmed.
PROFILE_FORM.TOAST_PLAN_REQUIRED: You must select a plan to publish your profile
PROFILE_FORM.TOAST_KYC_WARNING: Profile created, but there was an error saving the real data
PROFILE_FORM.INACTIVE_WARNING: Your profile is inactive. Please contact the administrator to activate it.

WARNING_DIALOG.TITLE: Welcome to
WARNING_DIALOG.MESSAGE_BEFORE_AGE: This website is intended exclusively for
WARNING_DIALOG.MESSAGE_AFTER_AGE: . By continuing to browse, you confirm that you meet the required age.
WARNING_DIALOG.DISCLAIMER_BODY: Flamme Rouge is a digital space for entertainment and listings.
WARNING_DIALOG.DISCLAIMER_HIGHLIGHT: It is not a prostitution site and does not promote human trafficking
WARNING_DIALOG.DISCLAIMER_CLOSING: . Our commitment is to respect, safety, and transparency.

PLAN_SELECTION_MODAL.PROMO_TITLE: Try your plan free for 7 days
PLAN_SELECTION_MODAL.PROMO_HINT: Pick a plan above, enter the code, and publish without PayPal or WhatsApp.
PLAN_SELECTION_MODAL.PROMO_INVALID: Invalid code. Check it and try again.
PLAN_SELECTION_MODAL.PROMO_SELECT_PLAN: Select a plan before applying the code.
PLAN_SELECTION_MODAL.PROMO_SUCCESS_DESC: Publish your profile with {{planName}} without PayPal or WhatsApp.

WHATSAPP_CONFIRM.TITLE: Confirm WhatsApp payment
WHATSAPP_CONFIRM.PROFILE_MESSAGE:
Your profile will stay in review until the WhatsApp payment is confirmed.
Once validated, our team will publish it and send you a confirmation.
WHATSAPP_CONFIRM.TOP_ROJO_MESSAGE:
TOP ROJO will activate once the WhatsApp payment is confirmed.
Our team will validate the payment and publish it for the selected plan duration.
WHATSAPP_CONFIRM.COMMENT_PLANS_MESSAGE:
The comment plan will activate once the WhatsApp payment is confirmed.
Our team will validate the payment and enable comments according to the selected plan.

WHATSAPP_PAYMENT.PROFILE_PLAN: Hi, I'm {{name}}. I'd like information to pay for the {{planName}} plan for EUR {{price}}. Thank you.
WHATSAPP_PAYMENT.COMMENT_PLAN: Hi, I'd like information to pay for the {{planName}} plan for EUR {{price}}. Thank you.
WHATSAPP_PAYMENT.TOP_ROJO_PLAN: Hi, I'm {{name}}. I'd like information to pay for the {{planName}}{{durationSuffix}} plan for EUR {{price}}. Thank you.

LOGOUT_DIALOG.TITLE: Do you want to log out?
LOGOUT_DIALOG.MESSAGE: if you log out, you will need to sign in again to access Flamme Rouge. Make sure you have saved your information before leaving.
